mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agent_profile WHERE id = #{agentProfileId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(id) AS id, agent_profile_id AS agentProfileId, title, status, default_provider_id AS defaultProviderId, BIN_TO_UUID(active_job_id) AS activeJobId, version, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM conversation WHERE id = #{id,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}

SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(id) AS id, agent_profile_id AS agentProfileId, title, status, default_provider_id AS defaultProviderId, BIN_TO_UUID(active_job_id) AS activeJobId, version, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM conversation WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY updated_at DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.sql: BIN_TO_UUID(id) AS id, role, message_type AS messageType, content, BIN_TO_UUID(job_id) AS jobId, BIN_TO_UUID(task_run_id) AS taskRunId, created_at AS createdAt
mapper.select: SELECT FROM message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND message_type IN ( 'TEXT', 'TASK_RESULT', 'TASK_FAILURE', 'CLARIFICATION_QUESTION', 'CLARIFICATION_DISAMBIGUATION', 'CONTROL_COMMAND_ACK' ) ORDER BY created_at, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message ( id, conversation_id, role, message_type, content, idempotency_key, job_id, task_run_id, metadata_json ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{role}, #{messageType}, #{content}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, JSON_OBJECT() )
mapper.update: UPDATE conversation SET active_job_id = #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, title = CASE WHEN title = '新的对话' THEN #{title} ELSE title END, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
